biz_name: For The Love of My Hair

messages.body: Im on the phone with my bank.
Hermine ,  let's just connect once
Please just refund. I dont need to be reached
I followed up 2 times. And no one reached out to me.
Please refund full amount or I will report your company.
we are processing you refund.
I have asked tanmay to call you as soon as possible.
Hi Hermine
No. Thats okay. Your company is very irresponsible and careless.
This is the last time I am asking for a FULL REFUND.
Tanmay is trying to reach you for the refund.
Sorry, mailbox is full to send an SMS.
Hello? Do not leave a message. Sorry. Mailbox. Sorry. Mailbox.
Tomorrow at 2
Please confirm today at 2pm pst
the link was on your email

Hi, this is Tanmay from Zoca. I completely understand that calls can be missed for various reasons — it happens to all of us. I just wanted to check in to ensure we can get started and keep everything on track for you.  …

This is Tanmay from Zoca. I attempted to reach you by phone but was unable to connect. I want to sincerely apologize for the lack of communication since your onboarding. Unfortunately, your previous Growth Manager is una…

Hermine
My emails have been deleted. Im not sure why. But I dont have the link
Hi are you sending me a link to get on a call or we are rescheduling
Hello. I never got a call
i am assigning someone to call you again.
Am tried to call you but was not able to reach out.

Hello? Hello? Hello? Hello? Yes, can you hear me? Yes, I can hear you, Harmeen. Harmeen, the call, actually, it was secured, but I think your email, you were not able to see your email because your emails were deleted, r…

sounds good.

Yes
Please join the meeting.
